summary: 208-byte template + thread_url_slug tested. ERR_HTTP2 resolved on perplexity_ask (200 OK). STREAM_FAILED_FIRST_CHUNK_ERROR not observed. BUT thread_url_slug caused 403 on thread fetch, showing 'private answer' dialog instead of warning text.

thread_url_slug_behavior.thread_fetch_result: 403 Forbidden - thread UUID does not exist on Perplexity server
thread_url_slug_behavior.ui_effect: Perplexity shows '이 답변은 비공개입니다' (This answer is private) dialog with '액세스 요청' and 'Perplexity로 돌아가기' buttons

perplexity.thread_url_navigation: FAILED - URL stayed at perplexity.ai/? instead of navigating to thread
perplexity.err_http2_on_other_endpoints: experimentation POST got ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR (not APF related)
perplexity.response_data: Failed to load response data in DevTools (request already finished)

analysis.208_byte_template: WORKS - no ERR_HTTP2 on perplexity_ask (200 OK, h2)
analysis.thread_url_slug: RESOLVED STREAM_FAILED but CAUSED NEW ISSUE - fake UUID triggers 403 on thread fetch, Perplexity shows 'private answer' dialog instead of warning
analysis.recommendation: thread_url_slug needs valid-looking format or should be omitted. The 403 'private' dialog is worse UX than the original STREAM_FAILED error. Consider: (1) omit thread_url_slug entirely, (2) use empty string, (3) use a format that doesn't trigger thread fetch
